meta.description: ShieldNet periodic health monitoring — verifies agent liveness, LLM endpoint, scanner API, and embedding service

cmd: set -e; echo '=== ShieldNet Health Monitor ==='; echo ''; echo '[1/4] Agent endpoint...'; curl -sf --max-time $TIMEOUT_SECS "$AGENT_URL" > /dev/null && echo '  ✓ Agent: UP' || (echo '  ✗ Agent: DOWN' && exit 1); echo '[2/4] LLM endpoint (Nosana Qwen3.5-27B)...'; curl -sf --max-time $TIMEOUT_SECS "$LLM_ENDPOINT" > /dev/null && echo '  ✓ LLM: UP' || echo '  ✗ LLM: DEGRADED (will use fallback)'; echo '[3/4] Embedding endpoint (Nosana Qwen3-Embedding)...'; curl -sf --max-time $TIMEOUT_SECS "$EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT" > /dev/null && echo '  ✓ Embeddings: UP' || echo '  ✗ Embeddings: DEGRADED'; echo '[4/4] Scanner API (scan.bughunt.tech)...'; curl -sf --max-time $TIMEOUT_SECS "$SCANNER_API" > /dev/null && echo '  ✓ Scanner: UP' || echo '  ✗ Scanner: DEGRADED'; echo ''; echo '=== All health checks complete ==='; date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ'

echo '=== Latency Probe ==='; curl -o /dev/null -s -w 'Agent latency:     %{time_total}s
DNS lookup:        %{time_namelookup}s
Connect:           %{time_connect}s
TLS handshake:     %{time_appconnect}s
First byte:        %{time_starttransfer}s
' "$AGENT_URL"; echo ''; curl -o /dev/null -s -w 'LLM latency:       %{time_total}s
' "$LLM_ENDPOINT"
